creator: john@nlc.net.au
text:
New port version: transproxy 1.0. I would like to announce a
	new release of transproxy. This version has the 1.0 designation
	because I believe that its parsing of HTTP requests is now
	reliable and accurate. It supports HTTP/1.1 persistent connections
	reliably with Squid 2.

	Home page is http://transproxy.nlc.net.au/

How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
